name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: Chula Vista, CA's ACE Cash Express at 325 Palomar St provides fast payday and title loans with extended hours.
description_long:
Located at 325 Palomar St in Chula Vista, CA, this ACE Cash Express storefront is a standalone location serving the local community with quick financial solutions. The branch operates Monday through Friday from 9AM to 7PM, and Saturday from 9AM to 5PM, making it accessible for working Chula Vista residents who need evening or weekend service.

At this Chula Vista location, you can apply for payday loans, title loans, and other short-term credit products. The staff at 325 Palomar St can walk you through your options and process your application. For specific questions about rates, terms, or eligibility, call 619-585-0742 during business hours.

If you need cash before payday or want to leverage your vehicle's title, this ACE Cash Express in Chula Vista offers same-day or rapid funding. Bring a valid ID, proof of income, and details about your vehicle if applying for a title loan. ACE serves short-term credit needs for residents who need quick access to cash.
pros: Multiple service options in one location (loans, check cashing, bill payments, tax services, money transfers)
Online loan application available alongside physical store locations
Same-day and next-day funding advertised for emergency cash needs
Toll-free customer service lines dedicated to different inquiry types
State-specific compliance measures (California Notice at Collection displayed)
Rewards program incentives mentioned (Target gift card promotion)
Store locator functionality helps find nearby locations
cons: Service availability varies significantly by state; specific loan products unavailable in certain states like Colorado
Website 404 errors on location-specific pages indicate potential service gaps or maintenance issues
No transparent pricing, APR, or fee information visible on website excerpts
Title loans and payday-style products carry inherent risks of debt cycles and vehicle loss
Emergency cash products typically feature high interest rates standard to the industry
best_for: Consumers needing quick access to cash for immediate expenses
Individuals with vehicle equity who qualify for title loans
Customers requiring check cashing or bill payment services without a traditional bank
People seeking tax preparation services combined with other financial products
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is appropriate for consumers facing immediate cash needs who have access to a physical location in their state and can confirm that their desired loan product is available in their jurisdiction. The primary caveat is verifying state-by-state service availability before applying, as the website clearly indicates service limitations that vary by location, and consumers should understand the high-cost nature of title loans and emergency cash products.
services: Customer service via phone and email
meta_description: Chula Vista, CA - ACE Cash Express at 325 Palomar St. Fast payday and title loans with same-day approval.
